label: Memory
contract: Finish non-project-tracked durable-state closure for a substantively accepted quest: final debrief metadata, quest-note hygiene, memory consistency checks, memory writes or deferrals, stale-memory checks, cleanup, external durable-state records, and follow-up routing. Memory must not edit tracked project files.
nextLeaderAction: read the memory leader brief, assign the final Memory owner, then complete the quest only after durable state, final debrief metadata, and the memory statement are settled
